title: Ember & Oak - BBQ Smokehouse
seoTitle: Ember & Oak - BBQ Smokehouse - Free Restaurant Website Template | Multiverse
prompt: Build a premium restaurant website inspired by Ember & Oak - BBQ Smokehouse. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.

files.content:
EMBER & OAK
  • Story
  • Specialties
  • Menu
  • Reviews

Slow-Smoked Perfection

Award-winning BBQ smoked 8+ hours over oak & hickory

20+
Years Smoking
50K+
Customers
8 HRS
Smoke Time
100%
Satisfaction
BBQ Mastery

Our BBQ Legacy

Ember & Oak was born from a passion for authentic, slow-smoked BBQ. We've been perfecting our craft for over 20 years, using traditional smoking methods and premium meats.

Every cut is carefully selected and smoked for 8+ hours over oak and hickory wood, creating the perfect bark and incredibly tender, smoky meat.

  • Family-Owned & Operated
  • Award-Winning Ribs & Brisket
  • Traditional Smoking Methods
  • Premium Meat Selection

Our Specialties

Signature smoked meats that bring people back

Smoked Ribs

Tender, fall-off-the-bone with secret dry rub

Brisket

14-hour smoked with perfect bark & smoke ring

Pulled Pork

12-hour smoked, hand-pulled with pickles

Smoked Chicken

Whole birds, golden & juicy inside

Smoked Sausage

House-made, smoked fresh daily

Sides & Sauces

Authentic BBQ sides & house-made sauces

Menu

Smoked daily, served with pride

Smoked Meats

Brisket

14-hour oak & hickory smoked

$26
St. Louis Ribs

Fall-off-the-bone smoked

$24
Pulled Pork

12-hour smoke, hand-pulled

$18
Smoked Turkey

Whole bird, moist & tender

$22
Beef Ribs

Massive & meaty

$32

Combos & Plates

Pitmaster Combo

Brisket, ribs, pork + 2 sides

$38
Triple Threat

Brisket, ribs, sausage

$35
Rib Rack

Full rack + coleslaw & beans

$28
Smokehouse Platter

All specialties, feeds 2-3

$65
Kids BBQ

Pork or ribs + fries & drink

$12

What Pitmasters Say

Reviews from our community

★★★★★

"Best brisket ever. Perfect bark, incredible smoke ring, meat melts in mouth. This is authentic BBQ done right."

Tom Richardson

BBQ Pitmaster

★★★★★

"My go-to for years. Consistency is incredible—every visit delivers same quality. Sides are outstanding too!"

Marcus & Family

Regular Customers

★★★★★

"Service is warm as the smoker. Great atmosphere, authentic BBQ, fair prices. A true BBQ destination."

Allison Hayes

Food Writer

Smoke Never Sleeps

Experience BBQ that takes time, skill, and passion

Reserve

Ember & Oak

Award-winning BBQ smoked with passion and tradition since day one.
